candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, not the total.
Subset of current assets, not the full total.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash-related but should not be used for CHE unless cash and cash equivalents is unavailable.

candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash line, but balance sheet cash is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet cash and cash equivalents; restricted cash excluded.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match for short-term debt/current borrowings and excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Due Within 1 Year
candidates.why: Would represent current portion of long-term debt if populated, but appears unavailable here.
Same concept, but the populated reported line is the capitalized variant.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the populated short-term debt line. Excluded lease-related current liabilities and did not add current maturities line to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct match for total/net PPE; preferred over ROU asset lines.

candidates.why: Lease ROU asset, not baseline PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Lease-related asset, not preferred when total PPE exists.

variables.notes: Preferred the reported total/net PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Other Other Long Term Assets - Total
candidates.why: Non-current asset component, not total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash provided by continuing operating activities
candidates.why: Direct operating cash flow line on cash flow statement; best match for OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Cash provided by continuing operating activities

variables.notes: No candidate shortlist was provided for OANCF; selected the exact cash flow operating activities line confidently.
